avatar_mappings._note: Run npm run setup to list available HeyGen avatars, then add IDs here

avatar_mappings.description: Male or Female, 55+, calm and trustworthy

heygen._note: Add at least one default avatar ID for ICPs that don't match any pattern

argil._note: Set clone_id after creating your personal clone on argil.ai

ugc_creators._note: Top N scripts go to human UGC creators instead of AI avatars
